  manufacturer_name varchar [note: 'Legal name of the manufacturer or legal manufacturer of the IVD product or facility covered by this registration.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this registration record was last modified or updated in the system.']
  next_renewal_date date [note: 'Date by which the next renewal submission or renewal fee payment is due. Null if renewal is not required or not yet scheduled.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes or comments regarding this registration, including special conditions, restrictions, or internal tracking information.']
  registration_certificate_reference varchar [note: 'Document reference, file path, or vault identifier for the official registration certificate or approval letter issued by the regulatory authority.']
  registration_date date [note: 'Date when the registration was officially granted or issued by the regulatory authority.']
  registration_number varchar [note: 'Official registration number or identifier issued by the regulatory authority. This is the externally-known unique identifier for the registration (e.g., FDA establishment registration number, Health Canada device license number, TGA ARTG number).']
  registration_scope varchar [note: 'Description of the scope of the registration: which products, device types, or activities are covered by this registration. May list multiple products or device families if the registration covers a portfolio.']
  registration_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the registration: active (in force), pending (submitted but not yet approved), expired (past expiry date), suspended (temporarily halted by authority), cancelled (terminated by registrant), or withdrawn (revoked by authority).']
  registration_type varchar [note: 'Type of registration: product-level IVD registration, facility/establishment registration, manufacturer registration, importer registration, distributor registration, or authorized representative registration.']
  regulatory_authority_name varchar [note: 'Name of the regulatory authority or competent authority that issued the registration (e.g., U.S. Food and Drug Administration, Health Canada, Therapeutic Goods Administration, ANVISA, NMPA, PMDA, CDSCO, national competent authority in EU member states).']
  regulatory_contact_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the primary regulatory contact person. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.']
  regulatory_contact_name varchar [note: 'Name of the primary regulatory contact person responsible for this registration at the registrant organization.']
  regulatory_contact_phone varchar [note: 'Phone number of the primary regulatory contact person. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.']
  renewal_frequency_months varchar [note: 'Frequency in months at which the registration must be renewed (e.g., 12 for annual renewal, 60 for five-year renewal). Null if renewal is not required.']
  renewal_required_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this registration requires periodic renewal (True) or is perpetual/does not require renewal (False).']
  ruo_ivd_designation varchar [note: 'Designation indicating whether the product is for Research Use Only (RUO), In Vitro Diagnostic (IVD) use, or Laboratory Developed Test (LDT). RUO products are not intended for clinical diagnostic use; IVD products are approved for clinical use; LDT are laboratory-developed tests.']

  Note: 'Master record for all regulatory registrations — product-level IVD registrations, facility/establishment registrations, and manufacturer/importer registrations with global health authorities. Covers Health Canada, TGA (Australia), ANVISA (Brazil), NMPA (China), PMDA (Japan), CDSCO (India), FDA establishment registration (21 CFR Part 807), EU authorized representative registrations, and other national competent authority filings. Captures registration type (product, facility, manufacturer, importer, distributor), registration number, country, facility address, registration date, expiry date, renewal status, local authorized representative, applicable product or facility scope, device types listed, and annual renewal obligations. SSOT for global regulatory registration, establishment compliance, and market access status across all registration types.'
}

Table regulatory.intelligence {
  intelligence_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the regulatory intelligence item. Primary key.']
  affected_submission_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of a specific regulatory submission that is directly impacted by this intelligence item, if applicable.']
  assigned_regulatory_affairs_owner_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Regulatory intelligence items must be assigned to specific RA employees for action, impact assessment, and response planning. Critical for managing regulatory horizon scanning, compliance obligations,']
  glossary_term_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to data.glossary_term. Business justification: Regulatory intelligence (guidance documents, draft regulations, standards updates) references standardized terminology for consistent interpretation across regulatory strategy and submissions. Ensures']
  market_segment_target_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to commercial.market_segment_target. Business justification: Regulatory intelligence about changing requirements (new standards, guideline updates, market access barriers) directly impacts market segment prioritization and go-to-market strategy. Commercial plan']
  superseded_by_intelligence_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the newer regulatory intelligence item that supersedes or replaces this item, if applicable.']
  affected_jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Geographic jurisdiction or region affected by this regulatory intelligence (e.g., USA, European Union, specific country codes). Multiple jurisdictions may be comma-separated.']
  affected_product_category varchar [note: 'Product category or product line affected by this regulatory intelligence (e.g., NGS sequencing instruments, IVD assays, gene editing tools, array-based products).']
  affected_regulatory_framework varchar [note: 'Regulatory framework or regulation impacted by this intelligence item (e.g., IVDR, FDA 510(k), ISO 13485, CLIA, HIPAA, GDPR).']
  comment_deadline_date date [note: 'Deadline date for submitting public comments or feedback on proposed rules or draft guidance documents.']
  compliance_obligation_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this intelligence item creates a new or modified compliance obligation that the organization must address (True/False).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this regulatory intelligence record was first created in the system.']
  document_url varchar [note: 'Web URL or hyperlink to the official published document or intelligence source for direct access and reference.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the regulatory intelligence item becomes effective or enforceable, if applicable.']
  horizon_scanning_priority varchar [note: 'Priority level assigned for horizon scanning and proactive regulatory strategy planning (urgent, high, medium, low).']
  impact_assessment_severity varchar [note: 'Assessed severity level of the impact this intelligence item has on the organization\'s regulatory compliance, product submissions, or market access (critical, high, medium, low, informational).']
  impact_summary varchar [note: 'Brief summary describing the potential impact of this regulatory intelligence on the organization\'s operations, compliance obligations, or strategic plans.']
  intelligence_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier or reference number assigned to this regulatory intelligence item for tracking and citation purposes.']
  intelligence_source varchar [note: 'Source or origin of the regulatory intelligence (e.g., regulatory authority website, industry association, legal database, subscription service).']
  intelligence_status varchar [note: 'Lifecycle status of the regulatory intelligence item within the organization\'s tracking system (active, archived, superseded, under review).']
  intelligence_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the regulatory intelligence item type (e.g., guidance document, proposed rule, final rule, draft guidance, notified body technical note, legislative change, standards update). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: guidance_document|proposed_rule|final_rule|draft_guidance|technical_note|legislative_change|standard_update — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  issuing_agency varchar [note: 'Name of the regulatory authority, notified body, or standards organization that issued this intelligence item (e.g., FDA, EMA, ISO, notified body name).']
  issuing_agency_code varchar [note: 'Standardized code or abbreviation for the issuing agency (e.g., FDA, EMA, ISO, IEC, CAP, CLIA).']
  keywords varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of keywords or tags for categorization, search, and retrieval of this intelligence item (e.g., NGS, IVD, CRISPR, quality system, labeling).']
  language_code varchar [note: 'ISO 639-1 two-letter language code indicating the primary language of the intelligence document (e.g., EN for English, DE for German, FR for French).']
  market_access_impact_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this intelligence item may impact the organization\'s ability to access or maintain market presence in affected jurisdictions (True/False).']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this regulatory intelligence record was last modified or updated.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next periodic review of this intelligence item to reassess its ongoing relevance and impact.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional notes, observations, or internal commentary related to this regulatory intelligence item.']
  publication_date date [note: 'Date when the regulatory intelligence item was officially published or released by the issuing agency.']
  related_intelligence_references varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of related regulatory intelligence item identifiers or reference numbers that are contextually linked to this item.']
  response_action_plan varchar [note: 'Detailed action plan outlining the organization\'s response strategy, required actions, and deliverables related to this intelligence item.']
  response_deadline_date date [note: 'Internal deadline by which the organization must complete its response or action plan related to this intelligence item.']
  response_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the organization\'s response to this regulatory intelligence item (not started, in progress, under review, completed, no action required).']
  review_date date [note: 'Date when this regulatory intelligence item was last reviewed by the regulatory affairs team for relevance and impact.']
  standard_reference_number varchar [note: 'Reference number of the standard (ISO, IEC, or other) if this intelligence item pertains to a standards update or revision.']
  title varchar [note: 'Full title or name of the regulatory intelligence item as published by the issuing authority.']
  vault_document_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier linking this intelligence item to a controlled document stored in Veeva Vault or the organization\'s document management system.']

  Note: 'Master record for regulatory intelligence items — tracked regulatory guidance documents, proposed rules, final rules, agency draft guidances, notified body technical notes, legislative changes, and standards updates (ISO, IEC) that may impact product submissions, compliance obligations, or market access. Captures intelligence source, issuing agency, publication date, effective date, impact assessment severity, affected products or submissions, affected jurisdictions, assigned regulatory affairs owner, response deadline, and response action plan. Enables proactive regulatory strategy, horizon scanning, and jurisdiction-aware compliance planning.'
}

  clinical_evidence_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the clinical evidence record. Primary key.']
  acmg_classification_rule_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.acmg_classification_rule.   cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Required for FDA 510(k), PMA, and EU MDR technical documentation submission']

  opportunity_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to commercial.opportunity. Business justification: Clinical evidence packages (sensitivity/specificity data, clinical utility studies) are critical sales tools in genomics. Opportunities track which evidence supports the value proposition; field appli']

  submission_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the regulatory submission (510(k), PMA, CE-IVD technical file) that this evidence supports.']

Ve']
  veeva_vault_document_id varchar [note: 'Unique document identifier in Veeva Vault for controlled regulatory document management.']
  accuracy_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Overall accuracy of the assay expressed as a percentage, representing the proportion of true results (both true positives and true negatives) among all cases examined.']
  analytical_sensitivity_lod varchar [note: 'Limit of detection (LOD) value demonstrating the lowest concentration or quantity of analyte that can be reliably detected.']
  analytical_specificity varchar [note: 'Description of analytical specificity, including cross-reactivity and interference testing results.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date when the clinical evidence package was internally approved for regulatory submission.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Name of the individual or role who approved the clinical evidence package.']
  clia_complexity varchar [note: 'CLIA complexity categorization for the IVD test: waived, moderate complexity, high complexity, or not applicable.']
  clinical_sensitivity_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Clinical sensitivity (true positive rate) expressed as a percentage, demonstrating the ability to correctly identify positive cases.']
  clinical_specificity_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Clinical specificity (true negative rate) expressed as a percentage, demonstrating the ability to correctly identify negative cases.']
  clinical_utility_statement varchar [note: 'Summary of the clinical utility demonstrated by this evidence, describing how the test result informs clinical decision-making or patient management.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the clinical evidence record was first created in the system.']
  document_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier or file path to the full clinical evidence document or report.']
  evidence_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier for the clinical evidence package, formatted as CE-NNNNNN.']
  evidence_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the clinical evidence package: draft, in review, approved, submitted to regulatory authority, archived, or superseded.']
  evidence_title varchar [note: 'Descriptive title of the clinical or performance evidence package.']
  evidence_type varchar [note: 'Category of clinical evidence: clinical evaluation report (CER), performance evaluation report (PER), analytical validation study, clinical utility study, literature review summary, or post-market clinical follow-up (PMCF).']
  informed_consent_obtained_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether informed consent was obtained from study participants (True/False).']
  intended_use varchar [note: 'Intended use statement for the IVD product as supported by this clinical evidence.']
  irb_approval_date date [note: 'Date when IRB or ethics committee approval was granted.']
  irb_approval_number varchar [note: 'IRB or ethics committee approval number for studies involving human subjects.']
  jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Regulatory jurisdiction for which this evidence is intended (3-letter ISO country code or \'global\'). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: USA|CAN|GBR|DEU|FRA|ITA|ESP|JPN|CHN|AUS|BRA|IND|global — 13 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  literature_references varchar [note: 'List of key literature references or publications cited in the evidence package (e.g., PubMed IDs, DOIs).']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the clinical evidence record was last modified.']
  negative_predictive_value_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Negative predictive value (NPV) expressed as a percentage, indicating the probability that a negative test result is a true negative.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes, comments, or context regarding the clinical evidence package.']
  positive_predictive_value_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Positive predictive value (PPV) expressed as a percentage, indicating the probability that a positive test result is a true positive.']
  precision_repeatability varchar [note: 'Description of precision and repeatability metrics, including coefficient of variation (CV) or standard deviation across replicates.']
  principal_investigator varchar [note: 'Name of the principal investigator or lead author responsible for the study or evidence generation.']
  reference_standard varchar [note: 'Gold standard or comparator method used for validation (e.g., Sanger sequencing, clinical diagnosis, predicate device).']
  regulatory_pathway varchar [note: 'Regulatory pathway for which this evidence is intended: FDA 510(k), PMA, De Novo, CE-IVD, IVDR Class A/B/C/D, Laboratory Developed Test (LDT), Research Use Only (RUO). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: fda_510k|fda_pma|fda_de_novo|ce_ivd|ivdr_class_a|ivdr_class_b|ivdr_class_c|ivdr_class_d|ldt|ruo|not_applicable — 11 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  reproducibility varchar [note: 'Description of reproducibility metrics across different operators, instruments, sites, or time points.']
  sample_size varchar [note: 'Number of samples or subjects included in the study or evidence generation activity.']
  study_completion_date date [note: 'Date when the study or evidence generation activity was completed.']
  study_design varchar [note: 'Methodological design of the study or evidence generation activity. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: prospective_cohort|retrospective_cohort|case_control|randomized_controlled_trial|observational|meta_analysis|systematic_review|bench_study|not_applicable — 9 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  study_site varchar [note: 'Name and location of the clinical or laboratory site where the study was conducted.']
  study_start_date date [note: 'Date when the study or evidence generation activity commenced.']
  target_population varchar [note: 'Description of the patient or sample population for which the evidence applies (e.g., adult oncology patients, prenatal screening cohort).']

  Note: 'Master record for clinical and performance evidence packages supporting regulatory submissions — clinical evaluation reports (CER), performance evaluation reports (PER), analytical validation studies, clinical utility studies, and literature review summaries. Captures evidence type, study design, LOD/analytical sensitivity data, clinical sensitivity/specificity, reference standard, evidence status, and linked submission. Supports IVD regulatory pathway justification under FDA and EU IVDR.'
}

Table regulatory.commitment {
  commitment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the regulatory commitment record. Primary key.']
  approval_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to the originating regulatory approval that imposed this commitment. Links to the regulatory_approval product.']
  capa_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to a related CAPA record if the commitment was triggered by or resulted in a corrective or preventive action. Links to the quality.capa product.']
  change_control_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key reference to a related change control record if the commitment involves product or process changes. Links to the quality.change_control product.']
  internal_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.internal_order. Business justification: Regulatory commitments (post-approval studies, additional testing) often require internal orders for resource allocation and cost tracking. Enables project accounting for commitment fulfillment and li']
  quality_issue_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to data.quality_issue. Business justification: Quality issues in data supporting regulatory commitments (post-approval studies, annual reports, PMCF data) require tracking and resolution to fulfill agency obligations. Links commitment deliverables']
  responsible_owner_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Regulatory commitments require designated employee owners for accountability and execution tracking. Links commitments to qualified employees responsible for deliverable completion, essential for FDA/']
  agency_acceptance_status varchar [note: 'Status of the regulatory authority\'s review and acceptance of the submitted deliverable. Tracks whether the commitment has been formally closed by the agency.']
  agency_feedback varchar [note: 'Summary of feedback, comments, or additional requirements communicated by the regulatory authority in response to the submitted deliverable.']
  commitment_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the commitment requirements, scope, deliverables, and any specific conditions or milestones imposed by the regulatory authority or notified body.']
  commitment_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier for the commitment, often assigned by the regulatory authority or internally tracked. May reference FDA post-approval study numbers, PMA condition identifiers, or notified body audit reference codes.']
  commitment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the commitment. Tracks whether the obligation is pending initiation, actively being fulfilled, completed, overdue, waived by the authority, or cancelled.']
  commitment_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the regulatory commitment. Indicates the nature of the obligation imposed by the regulatory authority or notified body. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: post_approval_study|pma_condition|notified_body_audit|post_market_surveillance|annual_report|periodic_safety_update|labeling_update — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  completion_date date [note: 'Actual date on which the commitment was fulfilled and evidence submitted to the regulatory authority. Null if not yet completed.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the regulatory commitment record was first created in the system. Follows ISO 8601 format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.']
  deliverable_document_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier or Veeva Vault document ID for the deliverable submitted to fulfill the commitment. Links to the regulatory_document product.']
  deliverable_type varchar [note: 'Type of deliverable required to fulfill the commitment. Specifies the format and content expected by the regulatory authority. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: study_protocol|interim_report|final_report|annual_report|audit_response|labeling_change|safety_update — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  due_date date [note: 'Target date by which the commitment must be fulfilled or the deliverable submitted to the regulatory authority. Critical for compliance tracking and escalation.']
  escalation_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the commitment has been escalated to senior management or regulatory leadership due to delays, risks, or agency concerns. True if escalated, False otherwise.']
  evidence_of_fulfillment varchar [note: 'Description or reference to evidence demonstrating that the commitment has been fulfilled. May include study completion certificates, audit reports, or agency acceptance letters.']
  extended_due_date date [note: 'Revised due date if an extension was granted by the regulatory authority. Null if no extension granted.']
  extension_granted_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the regulatory authority granted an extension to the commitment due date. True if granted, False otherwise.']
  extension_requested_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether an extension of the commitment due date has been requested from the regulatory authority. True if extension requested, False otherwise.']
  imposed_date date [note: 'Date on which the commitment was formally imposed by the regulatory authority or notified body, typically the approval date or a subsequent correspondence date.']
  internal_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for internal comments, observations, or context relevant to the commitment. Not shared with regulatory authorities.']
  jurisdiction_country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code representing the jurisdiction where the commitment applies. Example: USA, DEU, GBR.']
  mitigation_plan varchar [note: 'Description of actions planned or taken to mitigate risks and ensure timely fulfillment of the commitment. May include resource reallocation, vendor engagement, or protocol amendments.']
  modified_by varchar [note: 'Username or identifier of the user who last modified the regulatory commitment record. Part of the audit trail for compliance and traceability.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the regulatory commitment record was last modified. Follows ISO 8601 format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.']
  originating_authority varchar [note: 'Name of the regulatory authority or notified body that imposed the commitment. Examples: FDA CDRH, EMA, Notified Body 0123, Health Canada.']
  priority_level varchar [note: 'Business priority assigned to the commitment based on regulatory risk, business impact, and urgency. Used for resource allocation and escalation.']
  product_code varchar [note: 'Internal or regulatory product code identifying the product subject to the commitment. May reference FDA product classification codes, SKU, or internal catalog identifiers.']
  product_name varchar [note: 'Name of the product or device to which this commitment applies. Matches the approved product name in the regulatory approval record.']
  responsible_department varchar [note: 'Department or functional area accountable for fulfilling the commitment. Examples: Regulatory Affairs, Clinical Operations, Quality Assurance, Post-Market Surveillance.']
  risk_assessment varchar [note: 'Summary of the regulatory and business risks associated with non-fulfillment or delayed fulfillment of the commitment. Informs prioritization and mitigation strategies.']
  start_date date [note: 'Date on which work on the commitment officially began. Relevant for tracking progress and calculating time-to-completion.']
  submission_confirmation_number varchar [note: 'Confirmation or tracking number provided by the regulatory authority upon receipt of the commitment deliverable. Used for audit trail and verification.']
  title varchar [note: 'Short descriptive title of the commitment for identification and reporting purposes. Example: \'Five-Year Post-Market Clinical Follow-Up Study for Device XYZ\'.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'Username or identifier of the user who created the regulatory commitment record. Part of the audit trail for compliance and traceability.']

  Note: 'Master record for post-approval regulatory commitments and conditions — FDA post-approval study commitments, PMA conditions of approval, IVDR notified body surveillance audit schedules, and agency-imposed post-market requirements. Captures commitment type, originating approval, due date, completion status, evidence of fulfillment, and responsible owner. Ensures ongoing compliance with conditions attached to regulatory approvals.'
}

Table regulatory.notified_body {
  notified_body_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the notified body record. Primary key for the notified body entity.']
  accreditation_body varchar [note: 'Name of the national accreditation body that accredited the notified body to ISO 17065 and relevant standards (e.g., DAkkS, UKAS, COFRAC).']
  accreditation_certificate_number varchar [note: 'Unique certificate number issued by the accreditation body confirming the notified body\'s accreditation to perform conformity assessments.']
  accreditation_expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the notified body\'s current accreditation certificate expires and requires renewal or reassessment.']
  accreditation_issue_date date [note: 'Date when the notified body\'s accreditation certificate was originally issued by the accreditation body.']
  accreditation_scope varchar [note: 'Description of the notified body\'s accreditation scope, including the IVD device classes (A, B, C, D) and specific product categories they are authorized to assess under IVDR.']
  audit_frequency_months varchar [note: 'Standard frequency in months at which the notified body conducts surveillance audits of Genomics Biotech\'s quality management system (QMS) and technical documentation (typically 12 months for annual surveillance).']
  average_turnaround_time_days varchar [note: 'Average number of days the notified body takes to complete conformity assessment activities from submission to certificate issuance, based on historical performance.']
  certificate_expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the current conformity assessment certificate expires and requires renewal or reassessment by the notified body.']
  certificate_issue_date date [note: 'Date when the current conformity assessment certificate was issued by the notified body.']
  certificate_number varchar [note: 'Unique certificate number issued by the notified body for the current valid CE-IVD or IVDR conformity assessment certificate held by Genomics Biotech.']
  certificate_scope varchar [note: 'Description of the products, product families, or quality management system scope covered by the current certificate issued by the notified body.']
  competent_authority varchar [note: 'Name of the national competent authority that designated and oversees the notified body (e.g., BfArM in Germany, ANSM in France).']
  contract_end_date date [note: 'Scheduled expiration date of the current contract or service agreement with the notified body.']
  contract_start_date date [note: 'Effective start date of the current contract or service agreement with the notified body.']
  contract_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the contractual relationship between Genomics Biotech and the notified body for conformity assessment services.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the notified body record was first created in the system.']
  designated_countries varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country codes representing the EU member states and EEA countries where the notified body is designated to operate (e.g., DEU, FRA, ITA).']
  designation_date date [note: 'Date when the notified body was officially designated by the competent authority to perform conformity assessments under IVDR.']
  designation_status varchar [note: 'Current regulatory status of the notified body\'s designation by the competent authority.']
  device_class_coverage varchar [note: 'Pipe-separated list of IVD device classes that the notified body is designated to assess (Class A, Class B, Class C, Class D) under IVDR classification rules.']
  headquarters_address varchar [note: 'Full street address of the notified body\'s headquarters or principal place of business.']
  headquarters_city varchar [note: 'City where the notified body\'s headquarters is located.']
  headquarters_country_code varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code for the country where the notified body\'s headquarters is located (e.g., DEU, FRA, NLD).']
  headquarters_postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal or ZIP code for the notified body\'s headquarters address.']
  iso_13485_certified_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether the notified body itself maintains ISO 13485 certification for quality management systems applicable to medical devices.']
  last_audit_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent audit or conformity assessment activity completed by the notified body.']
  last_audit_outcome varchar [note: 'Summary outcome of the most recent audit conducted by the notified body, indicating compliance status and any findings.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the notified body record was last modified or updated in the system.']
  nando_database_url varchar [note: 'Direct link to the notified body\'s profile in the European Commission\'s NANDO database for verification and public transparency.']
  next_scheduled_audit_date date [note: 'Planned date for the next surveillance audit or conformity assessment activity by the notified body.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional notes, comments, or special considerations related to the notified body relationship, audit history, or operational details.']
  notified_body_name varchar [note: 'Full legal name of the notified body or conformity assessment organization as registered with the competent authority.']
  notified_body_number varchar [note: 'Official four-digit notified body identification number assigned by the European Commission (e.g., NB0123). This is the unique regulatory identifier for the notified body within the EU regulatory framework.']
  open_nonconformities_count varchar [note: 'Current number of open non-conformities or corrective action requests issued by the notified body that are pending resolution.']
  performance_rating varchar [note: 'Internal performance rating assigned to the notified body based on audit quality, turnaround time (TAT), responsiveness, and overall service delivery.']
  preferred_vendor_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this notified body is designated as a preferred vendor for Genomics Biotech\'s conformity assessment needs based on performance, cost, and relationship quality.']
  primary_contact_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the primary contact person at the notified body for official correspondence and coordination.']
  primary_contact_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the primary contact person at the notified body responsible for managing the relationship and coordinating assessments.']
  primary_contact_phone varchar [note: 'Direct phone number of the primary contact person at the notified body.']
  short_name varchar [note: 'Abbreviated or commonly used name for the notified body for operational reference and reporting.']
  website_url varchar [note: 'Official website URL of the notified body for public information and documentation access.']

  Note: 'Master record for EU notified bodies and third-party conformity assessment organizations engaged for CE-IVD/IVDR certification, including the full lifecycle of their assessment activities. Captures notified body name, NB identification number, accreditation scope (IVD device classes), designated countries, primary contact, contract status, and audit schedule. Records each conformity assessment activity — IVDR Annex IX/X/XI assessments, ISO 13485 surveillance audits, CE-IVD technical file reviews, and QMS audits — including assessment type, audit dates, scope, findings, non-conformities raised, corrective action responses, certificate outcomes, and certificate expiry. SSOT for notified body relationships and the complete conformity assessment lifecycle from initiation to certificate issuance.'
}

Table regulatory.conformity_assessment {
  conformity_assessment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the conformity assessment activity. Primary key for the conformity assessment record.']
  accounts_payable_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.accounts_payable. Business justification: Notified body conformity assessments generate invoices for audit services, certificate issuance, and surveillance activities. Links regulatory audit events to AP for invoice matching, payment processi']
  approval_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.regulatory_approval. Business justification: conformity_assessment tracks conformity assessment activities conducted by notified bodies, which lead to regulatory approvals (CE marking). Each conformity assessment is associated with a specific re']
  establishment_registration_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.establishment_registration. Business justification: conformity_assessment audits are conducted at specific facilities/establishments. Each conformity assessment is associated with one establishment registration (the facility being audited). Adding esta']
  internal_assessment_owner_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Internal owner for conformity assessments coordinates notified body interactions, audit preparation, and CAPA responses. Links assessments to qualified employees responsible for ISO 13485 compliance a']
  notified_body_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.notified_body. Business justification: conformity_assessment records audits conducted by notified bodies. Each assessment is performed by one notified_body. Adding notified_body_id FK normalizes notified_body_name and notified_body_number ']
  quality_assessment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to data.quality_assessment. Business justification: Conformity assessments (ISO 13485 audits, notified body reviews) include evaluation of QMS data quality, document control, and records management. Quality assessment results support certification deci']
  veeva_vault_document_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier linking this conformity assessment to the controlled document stored in Veeva Vault regulatory document management system.']
  assessment_cost decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total cost incurred for the conformity assessment, including notified body fees, travel expenses, and internal resource costs.']
  assessment_cost_currency varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the assessment cost (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).']
  assessment_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier for the conformity assessment, typically assigned by the notified body or internal quality system. Used for external reference and tracking.']
  assessment_report_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier or document number for the formal conformity assessment report issued by the notified body or audit team.']
  assessment_scope varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the scope of the conformity assessment, including products, processes, sites, and Quality Management System (QMS) elements covered.']
  assessment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the conformity assessment. Tracks progression from initiation through certificate issuance or closure. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: Planned|In_Progress|Under_Review|Findings_Issued|CAPA_Pending|Completed|Certificate_Issued|Suspended|Withdrawn — 9 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  assessment_type varchar [note: 'Type of conformity assessment being conducted. Defines the regulatory framework and scope of the assessment activity.']
  audit_duration_days varchar [note: 'Total number of days allocated for the audit phase of the conformity assessment.']

  audit_start_date date [note: 'Date when the on-site or remote audit phase of the conformity assessment begins.']
  audit_team_members varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of audit team members participating in the conformity assessment, including technical experts and observers.']
  capa_acceptance_status varchar [note: 'Status of the notified body or auditor review and acceptance of submitted CAPA responses.']
  capa_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether Corrective and Preventive Actions are required in response to findings from the conformity assessment.']
  capa_response_due_date date [note: 'Deadline by which the organization must submit CAPA responses to address findings from the conformity assessment.']
  capa_response_submitted_date date [note: 'Date when the organization submitted CAPA responses to the notified body or auditor.']
  certificate_expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the issued conformity assessment certificate expires and requires renewal or re-assessment.']
  certificate_issue_date date [note: 'Date when the conformity assessment certificate was officially issued by the notified body.']
  certificate_number varchar [note: 'Unique certificate number issued by the notified body upon successful completion of the conformity assessment.']
  certificate_outcome varchar [note: 'Final outcome of the conformity assessment in terms of certification or approval status.']
  certificate_validity_years varchar [note: 'Number of years for which the conformity assessment certificate is valid before requiring renewal.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the conformity assessment record was first created in the system.']
  findings_count varchar [note: 'Total number of findings, observations, or non-conformities identified during the conformity assessment.']
  findings_summary varchar [note: 'High-level summary of key findings, non-conformities, and observations identified during the conformity assessment.']
  jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Geographic jurisdiction or market for which the conformity assessment applies (e.g., European Union, United States, Canada).']
  lead_auditor_name varchar [note: 'Name of the lead auditor or assessor responsible for conducting the conformity assessment.']
  major_nonconformities_count varchar [note: 'Number of major non-conformities identified that represent significant deviations from requirements and may impact product safety or regulatory compliance.']
  minor_nonconformities_count varchar [note: 'Number of minor non-conformities identified that represent less significant deviations from requirements.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the conformity assessment record was last modified or updated.']
  next_surveillance_due_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next surveillance audit required to maintain the conformity assessment certificate.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes, comments, or context related to the conformity assessment activity.']
  observations_count varchar [note: 'Number of observations or opportunities for improvement noted during the assessment that do not constitute non-conformities.']
  product_category_covered varchar [note: 'Product categories or device classifications covered by this conformity assessment (e.g., Class A, Class B, Class C, Class D IVDs, NGS instruments, reagent kits).']
  qms_standard_version varchar [note: 'Version of the Quality Management System standard against which the assessment is conducted (e.g., ISO 13485:2016).']
  regulatory_framework varchar [note: 'Primary regulatory framework or directive under which the conformity assessment is performed. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: IVDR|MDD|CE_IVD|FDA_QSR|ISO_13485|GMP|CLIA|CAP — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  surveillance_frequency_months varchar [note: 'Frequency in months at which surveillance audits must be conducted to maintain the conformity assessment certificate.']

  Note: 'Transactional record for each conformity assessment activity conducted by a notified body or internal team — IVDR Annex IX/X/XI assessments, ISO 13485 surveillance audits, CE-IVD technical file reviews, and QMS audits. Captures assessment type, notified body, audit dates, scope, findings, non-conformities raised, corrective action responses, and certificate outcome. Tracks the full conformity assessment lifecycle from initiation to certificate issuance.'
}

FDA (U.S. Food and Drug Administration) pathways include 510(k) premarket notification, PMA (Premarket Approval), and De Novo classification. EU pathways include CE-IVD (Conformité Européenne In Vitro Diagnostic) and IVDR (In Vitro Diagnostic Regulation) classifications. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: 510k|pma|de_novo|ce_ivd|ivdr_class_a|ivdr_class_b|ivdr_class_c|ivdr_class_d — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  product_category varchar [note: 'High-level category of the product (e.g., sequencing instrument, reagent kit, bioinformatics software, IVD (In Vitro Diagnostic) assay).']
  product_development_milestone_linkage varchar [note: 'References to key product development milestones that are aligned with or dependent on this regulatory strategy.']
  quality_management_system_standard varchar [note: 'The quality management system standard under which the product is developed and manufactured (e.g., ISO 13485, GMP (Good Manufacturing Practice)).']
  regulatory_document_references varchar [note: 'References to key regulatory documents supporting this strategy, such as technical files, design dossiers, and submission templates.']
  regulatory_intelligence_summary varchar [note: 'Summary of relevant regulatory intelligence, including recent guidance updates, competitor approvals, and regulatory landscape changes that inform the strategy.']
  risk_management_approach varchar [note: 'Description of the risk management approach and framework applied to the product, typically following ISO 14971 for medical devices.']
  risk_mitigation_plan varchar [note: 'High-level plan for mitigating identified regulatory risks.']
  ruo_ivd_designation varchar [note: 'Designation indicating whether the product is for RUO (Research Use Only), IVD (In Vitro Diagnostic), LDT (Laboratory Developed Test), or not applicable.']
  secondary_regulatory_pathways varchar [note: 'Additional or alternative regulatory pathways being considered or pursued in parallel, stored as comma-separated list.']
  strategy_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier for the regulatory strategy plan, used for external reference and tracking.']
  strategy_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the regulatory strategy plan.']
  submission_timeline_target date [note: 'Target date for regulatory submission based on the strategy plan.']
  target_markets varchar [note: 'Geographic markets and jurisdictions where regulatory approval is being sought, stored as comma-separated list of ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country codes.']
  title varchar [note: 'Descriptive title of the regulatory strategy plan.']
  version varchar [note: 'Version number of the regulatory strategy document, tracking revisions and updates over time.']

  Note: 'Master record for regulatory strategy plans developed for each product or program — defines intended regulatory pathway (510(k), PMA, De Novo, CE-IVD, IVDR Class B/C/D), target markets, submission timeline, predicate device strategy, clinical evidence strategy, and key regulatory risks. Captures strategy version, approval status, assigned regulatory lead, and linkage to product development milestones. Enables alignment between R&D, clinical, and regulatory affairs teams.'
}

Table regulatory.eudamed_registration {
  eudamed_registration_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the EUDAMED registration record. Primary key for this entity.']
  approval_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the linked IVDR regulatory approval record that this EUDAMED registration supports.']
  device_identifier_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.device_identifier. Business justification: eudamed_registration tracks EUDAMED device registrations, which include UDI information. device_identifier is the master table for UDI assignments. Adding udi_assignment_id FK normalizes udi_di, basic']
  metadata_schema_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to data.metadata_schema. Business justification: EUDAMED submissions require EU MDR-specified metadata structure (UDI-DI format, GMDN codes, economic operator data) for device registration. Metadata schema enforces EU regulatory data standards. Crit']
  acceptance_date date [note: 'The date on which the EUDAMED registration was accepted and activated by the competent authority, making the device legally marketable in the EU.']
  certificate_expiry_date date [note: 'The date on which the notified body certificate expires and must be renewed. Critical for maintaining market authorization.']
  certificate_issue_date date [note: 'The date on which the notified body issued the conformity assessment certificate for this device.']
  certificate_number varchar [note: 'The unique certificate number issued by the notified body for the conformity assessment of this device. Links to the uploaded certificate in EUDAMED.']
  companion_diagnostic_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the device is a companion diagnostic essential for the safe and effective use of a corresponding medicinal product. Requires coordination with EMA.']
  conformity_assessment_route varchar [note: 'The specific conformity assessment procedure followed under EU IVDR: Annex IX (full quality assurance), Annex X (type examination), or Annex XI (product conformity verification).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this EUDAMED registration record was first created in the system.']
  device_classification varchar [note: 'The risk classification of the IVD device under EU IVDR: Class A (lowest risk), Class B, Class C, or Class D (highest risk). Determines regulatory pathway and conformity assessment requirements.']
  device_model varchar [note: 'The specific model or version identifier of the IVD device, distinguishing it from other variants within the same product family.']
  device_name varchar [note: 'The commercial name or trade name of the IVD device as it appears on labeling and in the EUDAMED database.']
  economic_operator_address varchar [note: 'The registered address of the economic operator responsible for the device. Required for EUDAMED registration and regulatory correspondence.']
  economic_operator_country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code for the country where the economic operator is registered.']
  economic_operator_name varchar [note: 'The legal name of the economic operator (manufacturer, authorized representative, importer, or distributor) responsible for this EUDAMED registration.']
  economic_operator_srn varchar [note: 'The unique Single Registration Number assigned to the economic operator upon registration in EUDAMED. Format: country code followed by alphanumeric identifier.']
  economic_operator_type varchar [note: 'The role of the economic operator registering the device in EUDAMED: manufacturer, authorized representative, importer, or distributor.']
  effective_date date [note: 'The date from which the EUDAMED registration becomes legally effective and the device may be placed on the EU market.']
  eudamed_device_identifier varchar [note: 'Unique device identifier assigned by EUDAMED system upon successful registration. This is the system-generated EUDAMED-specific identifier distinct from UDI-DI.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'The date on which the EUDAMED registration expires and must be renewed or updated. Nullable for registrations without fixed expiry.']
  gmdn_code varchar [note: 'The five-digit GMDN code that classifies the device according to its intended purpose and technology. Required for EUDAMED registration.']
  gmdn_term varchar [note: 'The descriptive term associated with the GMDN code, providing a standardized name for the device category.']
  intended_purpose varchar [note: 'The intended use of the IVD device as defined by the manufacturer, describing the medical condition, disease, or physiological process it is designed to detect, diagnose, or monitor.']
  issuing_entity varchar [note: 'The organization that issued the UDI-DI under an FDA or EU-recognized UDI system. Common entities include GS1, HIBCC, ICCBBA, and IFA.']
  last_update_date date [note: 'The date on which the EUDAMED registration was last updated with new information or status changes.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this EUDAMED registration record was last modified or updated.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional notes, comments, or special instructions related to the EUDAMED registration process or status.']
  notified_body_name varchar [note: 'The name of the notified body that conducted the conformity assessment for this device, if applicable. Required for Class B, C, and D devices.']
  notified_body_number varchar [note: 'The four-digit identification number assigned to the notified body by the European Commission. Required for Class B, C, and D devices.']
  performance_evaluation_report_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier for the performance evaluation report demonstrating the device meets its intended purpose. Required under IVDR Annex XIII.']
  post_market_surveillance_plan_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier for the post-market surveillance plan required under IVDR Article 78. Tracks ongoing safety and performance monitoring.']
  registration_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the EUDAMED registration. Tracks progression from draft through submission, review, activation, and potential suspension or withdrawal. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: draft|submitted|under_review|active|suspended|withdrawn|expired — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  registration_type varchar [note: 'The category of EUDAMED registration: device registration, economic operator registration, notified body certificate upload, or UDI assignment.']
  reusable_device_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the device is intended for reuse after reprocessing. Affects validation and labeling requirements.']
  self_test_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the device is intended for self-testing by lay persons. Affects classification and labeling requirements.']
  sterile_device_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the device is supplied in a sterile condition. Affects labeling and conformity assessment requirements.']
  submission_date date [note: 'The date on which the EUDAMED registration was officially submitted to the European Commission database.']
  technical_documentation_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier for the technical documentation package maintained per IVDR Annex II. Links to document management system.']

  Note: 'Master record for EUDAMED (European Database on Medical Devices) registrations — device registrations, UDI-DI/UDI-PI assignments, economic operator registrations, and notified body certificate uploads required under EU IVDR. Captures EUDAMED device identifier, UDI-DI, basic UDI-DI, registration status, submission date, and linked IVDR approval. Supports EU IVDR Article 26 and Annex VI UDI and EUDAMED compliance obligations.'
}

Table regulatory.device_identifier {
  device_identifier_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for device_identifier']
  approval_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.regulatory_approval. Business justification: device_identifier tracks UDI assignments and device database registrations. UDI is assigned post-approval for approved products. Adding regulatory_approval_id FK directly links the UDI assignment to t']
  catalog_item_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the product master record for which this UDI assignment applies. Links to the genomic instrument, reagent kit, or IVD device product.']
  genome_assembly_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.genome_assembly. Business justification: IVD devices with genomic content must declare the reference genome build in their UDI-DI device master record and GUDID/EUDAMED submissions. Part of the device\'s technical specification and labeling r']
  gudid_submission_id varchar [note: 'The unique submission identifier assigned by FDA GUDID when the device identifier record was submitted to the FDA database.']
  metadata_schema_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to data.metadata_schema. Business justification: UDI/GUDID submissions follow FDA-mandated metadata schemas (SPL format, HL7 standards) for device identifier registration. Metadata schema defines required fields, controlled vocabularies, and validat']
  pharmacogenomics_marker_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.pharmacogenomics_marker. Business justification: PGx IVD devices must declare specific pharmacogenomic markers in their UDI-DI device master record and GUDID submissions. Required for FDA device listing and EUDAMED registration of companion diagnost']
  variant_database_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.variant_database. Business justification: IVD devices incorporating variant databases as software components must declare the specific database version in their device master record for GUDID and software bill of materials (SBOM) regulatory r']
  basic_udi_di varchar [note: 'The primary identifier of a device model that groups all device versions or models having the same intended purpose, design, and risk classification. Used for regulatory database queries.']
  catalog_number varchar [note: 'The manufacturer\'s catalog or part number used for ordering and inventory management. May differ from UDI-DI.']
  contains_latex_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the device or its packaging contains natural rubber latex, requiring allergen labeling.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this UDI assignment record was first created in the system.']
  device_classification varchar [note: 'The risk-based classification of the device under FDA or EU IVDR regulations. FDA uses Class I/II/III; EU IVDR uses Class A/B/C/D for IVDs. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: class_i|class_iia|class_iib|class_iii|class_a|class_b|class_c|class_d — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  device_description varchar [note: 'A detailed description of the device including its intended use, technology, and key features for regulatory database publication.']
  device_name varchar [note: 'The proprietary or trade name of the device as it appears on the label and in regulatory submissions.']
  discontinuation_date date [note: 'The date on which this UDI-DI was discontinued and is no longer used on newly manufactured devices.']
  economic_operator_registration_number varchar [note: 'The Single Registration Number (SRN) assigned to the manufacturer or authorized representative in EUDAMED for economic operator identification.']
  eudamed_device_identifier varchar [note: 'The unique device identifier assigned by EUDAMED for EU IVDR compliance. Links to the EU device registration and economic operator records.']
  eudamed_registration_date date [note: 'The date the device was registered in EUDAMED by the manufacturer or authorized representative.']
  eudamed_registration_status varchar [note: 'The current registration status of the device in the European Database on Medical Devices under EU IVDR Article 26.']
  gmdn_code varchar [note: 'The internationally recognized GMDN term code that categorizes the device by its intended purpose and technology.']
  gmdn_term_name varchar [note: 'The human-readable GMDN term name corresponding to the GMDN code.']
  gudid_status varchar [note: 'The current status of the device identifier record in the FDA GUDID system.']
  gudid_submission_date date [note: 'The date the UDI-DI record was submitted to the FDA Global Unique Device Identification Database.']
  intended_use_statement varchar [note: 'The general purpose of the device or its intended use as described in the labeling and regulatory submissions.']
  issuing_agency varchar [note: 'The FDA-accredited issuing agency that assigned the UDI-DI code. GS1 (Global Standards 1), HIBCC (Health Industry Business Communications Council), or ICCBBA (International Council for Commonality in Blood Banking Automation).']
  labeling_effective_date date [note: 'The date on which the current UDI labeling became effective and must appear on all newly manufactured devices.']
  labeling_storage_conditions varchar [note: 'The storage temperature and environmental conditions specified on the device label (e.g., 2-8°C, room temperature, protect from light).']
  model_number varchar [note: 'The manufacturer\'s model number or version identifier for the device, used to distinguish different configurations or generations.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this UDI assignment record was last modified.']
  mri_safety_status varchar [note: 'The MRI safety classification of the device indicating whether it is safe, conditionally safe, or unsafe in an MRI environment.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes, comments, or special instructions related to this UDI assignment, labeling requirements, or regulatory database submissions.']
  package_quantity varchar [note: 'The number of individual device units contained in the labeled package.']
  package_type varchar [note: 'The type of packaging used for the device (e.g., box, vial, tube, cartridge, flow cell).']
  regulatory_contact_email varchar [note: 'The email address of the regulatory affairs contact for UDI-related inquiries and submissions.']
  regulatory_contact_name varchar [note: 'The name of the regulatory affairs contact responsible for this UDI assignment and database submissions.']
  ruo_ivd_designation varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the device is marketed for Research Use Only, as an In Vitro Diagnostic, or as a Laboratory Developed Test.']
  shelf_life_months varchar [note: 'The validated shelf life of the device in months from the date of manufacture, as stated on the label and in stability studies.']
  single_use_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the device is intended for single use only and must not be reprocessed or reused.']
  sterile_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the device is provided in a sterile state and requires sterile labeling and handling.']
  udi_assignment_status varchar [note: 'The current lifecycle status of this UDI assignment record indicating whether it is actively used on device labels.']
  udi_carrier_type varchar [note: 'The form of automatic identification and data capture (AIDC) technology or human-readable interpretation used to convey the UDI on the device label.']
  udi_di_code varchar [note: 'The Device Identifier portion of the UDI that identifies the labeler and specific version or model of a device. Globally unique and assigned by an FDA-accredited issuing agency.']
  udi_pi_format varchar [note: 'The format of the Production Identifier portion of the UDI that identifies one or more production-specific attributes (lot, serial, manufacturing date, expiration date) for traceability. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: lot_number|serial_number|manufacturing_date|expiration_date|lot_and_serial|lot_and_expiration|serial_and_expiration — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  version_number varchar [note: 'The version or revision number of the device design, software, or labeling that may trigger a new UDI-DI assignment.']

  Note: 'Master record for Unique Device Identifier (UDI) assignments and device database registrations — UDI-DI (device identifier), UDI-PI (production identifier), GUDID submissions (FDA), and EUDAMED device registrations (EU IVDR). Captures UDI-DI code, UDI-PI format, Basic UDI-DI, issuing agency (GS1, HIBCC, ICCBBA), product reference, EUDAMED device identifier, EUDAMED registration status, economic operator registrations, and UDI-DI/UDI-PI linkage to labeling. Supports FDA GUDID, EU EUDAMED Article 26/Annex VI, and global UDI compliance for IVD and genomic instrument products.'
}

Table regulatory.establishment_registration {
  establishment_registration_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the establishment registration record. Primary key.']
  contact_person_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Establishment registration contact must be an internal employee for FDA establishment registration, annual updates, and regulatory correspondence. Links registration to qualified employees responsible']
  notified_body_id varchar [note: 'FK to regulatory.notified_body']
  annual_report_due_date date [note: 'Date by which the annual establishment registration update or report must be submitted to the regulatory authority. Format yyyy-MM-dd.']
  authorized_representative_address varchar [note: 'Full address of the authorized representative. Must be located within the jurisdiction where representation is required.']
  authorized_representative_name varchar [note: 'Name of the authorized representative in the EU or other jurisdiction acting on behalf of the manufacturer. Required for non-EU manufacturers under IVDR.']
  contact_person_title varchar [note: 'Job title or role of the primary regulatory contact person. Typically Regulatory Affairs Manager, Quality Director, or similar.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this establishment registration record was first created in the system. Format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.']
  device_classification_scope varchar [note: 'Regulatory device classifications covered by this establishment registration. For FDA: Class I, II, III. For EU: Class A, B, C, D per IVDR. May include multiple classifications.']
  device_types_manufactured varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list or description of the types of medical devices or IVD products manufactured, imported, or distributed by this establishment. Includes product categories such as NGS sequencers, array platforms, reagent kits, consumables.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the registration becomes legally effective and the establishment may begin operations under this registration. Format yyyy-MM-dd.']
  establishment_dba_name varchar [note: 'Trade name or doing business as name if different from legal establishment name. Used for facilities operating under alternate brand names.']
  establishment_name varchar [note: 'Legal name of the facility or establishment as registered with the regulatory authority. Must match official business registration documents.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the establishment registration expires and renewal is required. Null for jurisdictions with indefinite registration periods. Format yyyy-MM-dd.']
  facility_address_line1 varchar [note: 'Primary street address line of the registered establishment facility. Includes street number, street name, and building identifier.']
  facility_address_line2 varchar [note: 'Secondary address line for suite, floor, department, or other location details within the facility.']
  facility_city varchar [note: 'City or municipality where the registered establishment is physically located.']
  facility_country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code indicating the country where the establishment is physically located.']
  facility_postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal or ZIP code for the facility address. Format varies by country jurisdiction.']
  facility_state_province varchar [note: 'State, province, or administrative region where the facility is located. Use standard postal abbreviations where applicable.']
  gmp_certified_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the establishment holds valid GMP certification. True if certified under applicable GMP regulations, false otherwise.']
  inspection_outcome varchar [note: 'Result classification of the most recent regulatory inspection. Compliant indicates no findings, minor/major/critical indicate severity of non-conformances, pending indicates inspection report not yet finalized.']
  iso_13485_certificate_number varchar [note: 'Certificate number for the establishments ISO 13485 certification if applicable. Issued by notified body or certification authority.']
  iso_13485_certified_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the establishment holds valid ISO 13485 quality management system certification for medical devices.']
  jurisdiction_country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code indicating the regulatory jurisdiction under which this registration is filed. May differ from facility country for authorized representative registrations.']
  jurisdiction_region varchar [note: 'Regional or sub-national jurisdiction if applicable. Used for countries with state-level or provincial regulatory requirements.']
  last_inspection_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent regulatory inspection or audit conducted at this establishment by the competent authority or notified body. Format yyyy-MM-dd.']
  last_renewal_date date [note: 'Date when the most recent renewal was completed and accepted by the regulatory authority. Format yyyy-MM-dd.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this establishment registration record was last modified or updated. Format yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.']
  next_renewal_date date [note: 'Target date for the next registration renewal submission. Used for proactive compliance tracking. Format yyyy-MM-dd.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional information, special conditions, or internal notes regarding this establishment registration. Used for tracking unique circumstances or compliance considerations.']
  owner_operator_name varchar [note: 'Name of the legal entity or individual that owns or operates the establishment. May differ from establishment name for contract facilities.']
  parent_company_name varchar [note: 'Name of the parent company or corporate entity if the establishment is part of a larger organization. Used for corporate hierarchy tracking.']
  registration_date date [note: 'Date when the establishment registration was officially granted or accepted by the regulatory authority. Format yyyy-MM-dd.']
  registration_number varchar [note: 'Official registration number assigned by the regulatory authority. For FDA this is the establishment registration number per 21 CFR Part 807. For EU this is the authorized representative registration identifier.']
  registration_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the establishment registration. Active indicates valid registration, expired indicates renewal required, suspended indicates temporary hold by authority, cancelled indicates permanent termination, pending_renewal indicates renewal application submitted, under_review indicates initial application being evaluated.']
  registration_type varchar [note: 'Type of establishment registration indicating the role of the facility in the supply chain. Manufacturer produces devices, importer brings devices into jurisdiction, distributor handles logistics, authorized representative acts on behalf of non-EU manufacturer, contract manufacturer produces under contract, sterilizer provides sterilization services.']
  regulatory_authority varchar [note: 'Regulatory agency or competent authority that issued the establishment registration. FDA for United States, EMA for European Union, MHRA for United Kingdom, TGA for Australia, PMDA for Japan, ANVISA for Brazil, Health Canada for Canada, NMPA for China, COFEPRIS for Mexico. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: FDA|EMA|MHRA|TGA|PMDA|ANVISA|Health_Canada|NMPA|COFEPRIS — 9 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  renewal_frequency_months varchar [note: 'Number of months between required renewals. Typically 12 for annual renewal jurisdictions. Null if renewal not required.']
  renewal_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this registration requires periodic renewal. True for jurisdictions requiring annual or periodic renewal, false for indefinite registrations.']
  us_agent_address varchar [note: 'Full address of the designated US agent. Must be a physical US address, not a post office box.']
  us_agent_name varchar [note: 'Name of the US agent designated by foreign establishments for FDA registration per 21 CFR 807.40. Required for non-US manufacturers marketing devices in the United States.']

  Note: 'Master record for facility and establishment registrations with regulatory authorities — FDA establishment registration (21 CFR Part 807), EU authorized representative registrations, and country-specific manufacturer/importer registrations. Captures establishment name, registration number, facility address, registration type (manufacturer, importer, distributor), applicable device types, registration expiry, and annual renewal status. SSOT for regulatory facility compliance across global markets.'
}

Table regulatory.inspection {
  inspection_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for inspection']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the inspector who performed the inspection.']
  followup_inspection_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on inspection (followup_inspection_id)']
  site_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the facility, site, or location that was inspected.']
  submission_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to regulatory.submission. Business justification: Each inspection is performed for a specific regulatory submission; adding inspection.submission_id creates the required inbound/outbound connection, eliminates the silo, and respects all FK naming and']
  corrective_action_due_date date [note: 'Deadline by which required corrective actions must be completed.']
  corrective_action_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether corrective actions are required as a result of the inspection.']
  document_reference varchar [note: 'Link or identifier to the detailed inspection report document stored in the regulatory document management system.']
  follow_up_inspection_required boolean [note: 'Indicates if a subsequent inspection is mandated.']
  inspection_notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form text field for additional observations, comments, or remarks captured by the inspector.']
  inspection_number varchar [note: 'External reference number assigned to the inspection by the regulatory authority or internal tracking system.']
  inspection_result varchar [note: 'Overall outcome of the inspection.']
  inspection_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric score assigned to the inspection (e.g., 0‑100 scale).']
  inspection_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the inspection.']
  inspection_type varchar [note: 'Category of inspection (e.g., initial, follow‑up, surveillance, audit).']
  jurisdiction_country_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code of the jurisdiction where the inspection took place.']
  non_conformance_count varchar [note: 'Number of non‑conformities identified during the inspection.']
  performed_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact date and time when the inspection was performed.']
  record_audit_created timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the inspection record was first created in the system.']
  record_audit_updated timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the inspection record.']
  regulatory_agency varchar [note: 'Regulatory body responsible for the inspection.']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'Risk classification assigned to the inspection findings.']
  scheduled_date date [note: 'Planned date for the inspection to occur.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for inspection. Referenced by regulatory_inspection_id.'
}
